subcodes.first_line: In this day the effulgent rays of the Sun of Truth shine forth from the horizon of the heaven of Manifestation, and the Luminary of utterance gleams resplendent, without peer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز تجلیات انوار آفتاب حقیقت از افق سماء ظهور ظاهر و مشرق و نیر بیان من غیر
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for women, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
